We have had some notable first-party releases with the new Mario Tennis game and the Super Mario Bros. Wonder expansion, not to mention the surprisingly well-received Pokémon Pokopia. But Nintendo is going to need some heavy hitters to keep the hype rolling this year – will we finally get a new 3D Mario experience? Doesn’t sound like it at this point, but rumor has it a massive Zelda remake is inbound alongside a new Star Fox game and much sooner than later at that.

Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. This week was packed with tons of great deals thanks to Amazon’s ongoing Big Spring Sale, which delivered a wave of solid discounts across gaming PCs, monitors, accessories, and peripherals. From high-refresh-rate displays and workstation upgrades to controllers and desk gear, there was plenty to dig through, and many of those deals are still live and kicking. Whether you’re looking to upgrade your battlestation, fine-tune your setup, or simply snag a great price on gear you’ve been eyeing, we’ve rounded up the highlights from the past few days right here in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.

more…

items.summary:

From the first cash discount on AirPods Max 2 (they are now back in stock with a pre-order discount alongside the M5 MacBook Air lineup and various M5 MacBook Pro configs. Deals are now once again live on iPad mini joined by price drops across the M4 iPad Air lineup, $200 off M3 models, and some iPad 11 offers. Scope it all out below.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Big spring savings on Lectric e-bikes with up to $720 bundles, Anker SOLIX, EcoFlow, Bluetti power stations, and much more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. Today marks Day 4 of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, and we’ve already had three jam-packed days of amazing savings opportunities. If you’re looking for the best EV deals from the week, I recommend checking out the up to $720 e-bike savings from Lectric’s ongoing Nothin’ But Net Sale, as well as the extended Segway e-scooter deals. From there, we’ve seen Anker SOLIX, Bluetti, and EcoFlow increase power station savings up to 69%, with the latter brand also having a nice array of better Amazon deals on compact power stations. That’s just the tip of the iceberg, with more waiting for you below and everything collected into our Spring Sale Green Deals hub here for all your one-stop shopping needs.

items.title: 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – adidas extra 30% off, shoes from $20, tomtoc bags, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. From top-tier fashion houses and everyday pieces for your work week, right through to super affordable pickups to freshen up your essentials, every week we scour the interwebs for the best deals on footwear and clothing to ensure you never pay full price to update your closet game. With Amazon’s Big Spring Sale underway, there are more markdowns than usual to cash in on. Many of the posts below features loads of discounts, so you’ll need to dive in to truly absorb everything in store. This week’s highlights include Columbia, Cole Haan, Carhartt, adidas, Nike, and more.
